title: non-database field
text: non-database field Any field that is not stored in the database. Non-database fields can be defined for a modeled entity or in a component entity. Related Links Non-Database Field A non-database field is a Modeled Field or Component Field whose Is External property is F. It can be used for a control, constant data, derived data, or other non-persistent data. It cannot be used for database I/O or passing in an entity or occurrence parameter. Was this topic helpful?
